tasks.label: run-migration
tasks.command: cd backend && echo test && dir /b src\db\migrations\*.sql

tasks.label: update-journal
tasks.command: $j = Get-Content 'backend/src/db/migrations/meta/_journal.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json ; $entry = [PSCustomObject]@{idx=4; version='7'; when=1782490000000; tag='0004_add_informed_consent'; breakpoints=$true} ; $j.entries += $entry ; $j | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content 'backend/src/db/migrations/meta/_journal.json' -Encoding UTF8 ; Write-Host 'Journal updated'

tasks.label: apply-sql-migration
tasks.command: docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy -c "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS informed_consent boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;"

tasks.label: apply-sql
tasks.command: docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy --command "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS informed_consent boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;"

tasks.label: apply-sql-via-stdin
tasks.command: echo 'ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS informed_consent boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false;' | docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy

tasks.label: record-migration
tasks.command: echo "INSERT INTO drizzle.__drizzle_migrations (id, hash, created_at) VALUES (4, '0004_add_informed_consent', 1782490000000) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;" | docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy

tasks.label: record-migration2
tasks.command: Set-Content -Path tmp_mig.sql -Value "INSERT INTO drizzle.__drizzle_migrations (id, hash, created_at) VALUES (4, '0004_add_informed_consent', 1782490000000) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;" ; Get-Content tmp_mig.sql | docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy ; Remove-Item tmp_mig.sql

tasks.label: run-migration-script
tasks.command: docker cp backend/src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js kidneybuddy-backend:/app/src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js ; docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js

tasks.label: run-mig-again
tasks.command: docker cp backend/src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js kidneybuddy-backend:/app/src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js ; docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx src/db/migrations/apply_0004.js

tasks.label: test-backend
tasks.command: cd backend ; npm test 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'TEST_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE

tasks.label: e2e-test
tasks.command: docker cp backend/src/test/profile.e2e.ts kidneybuddy-backend:/app/src/test/profile.e2e.ts ; docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx src/test/profile.e2e.ts 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'E2E_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE

tasks.label: check-frontend-tsc
tasks.command: cd frontend ; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'TSC_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE

tasks.label: check-reset-tokens
tasks.command: echo "SELECT id, user_id, left(token_hash, 16) as token_prefix, expires_at < now() as expired, used_at IS NOT NULL as used FROM password_reset_tokens ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;" | docker exec -i kidneybuddy-db psql -U kidneybuddy -d kidneybuddy

tasks.label: run-tests
tasks.command: cd backend ; npm test 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'TEST_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE

tasks.label: run-verify-test
tasks.command: docker cp backend/src/test/verify_single_use.ts kidneybuddy-backend:/app/src/test/verify_single_use.ts ; docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx src/test/verify_single_use.ts 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'VERIFY_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE

tasks.label: check-register-error
tasks.command: docker-compose logs --tail=20 backend 2>&1 ; Write-Host '---' ; Write-Host 'Testing register with informedConsent...' ; docker exec kidneybuddy-backend node --import tsx -e "(async()=>{const BASE='http://localhost:4000';const h={'Content-Type':'application/json'};const rand=Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8);const r=await fetch(BASE+'/api/auth/register',{method:'POST',headers:h,body:JSON.stringify({email:'test_'+rand+'@test.com',namaLengkap:'Test',password:'Test1234!',konfirmasiPassword:'Test1234!',nomorTelepon:'08123456789',tanggalLahir:'1990-01-01',informedConsent:true})});const d=await r.json();console.log('Status:',r.status);console.log('Response:',JSON.stringify(d,null,2));})( )" 2>&1

tasks.label: ship-preflight
tasks.command: Write-Host '=== Git Status ===' ; git status --short 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host '=== Current Branch ===' ; git branch --show-current 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host '=== Remote ===' ; git remote -v 2>&1 ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host '=== gh CLI ===' ; Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host '=== Phase Dir ===' ; Get-ChildItem .planning/phases/01* -Directory | Select-Object Name

tasks.label: stage-files
tasks.command: git add -A 2>&1 ; Write-Host 'Staged all files' ; git status --short 2>&1 | Measure-Object -Line ; Write-Host '' ; Write-Host 'STAGE_EXIT:' $LASTEXITCODE
